title: Beam Global Q3 2024 Operating Results and Strategic Achievements
text: Gross Margin reached 10.7% of sales, the highest Q3 margin ever, a 9-point improvement year-over-year. YTD Gross Margin reached 12.4%, up 11 points compared to 2023. Revenue was $11.5 million for Q3 (down 22% from Q2 2024); $41.0 million YTD. Net Income was $1.3 million for Q3 (vs. $3.6 million loss in Q3 2023). Cash Position: $4.9 million; debt-free with $100 million unused credit line. Acquired Telcom to bring power electronics manufacturing in-house. Launched four new products: BeamSpot, BeamBike, BeamPatrol, and BeamWell. Delivered 10 UK Ministry of Defence EV ARC systems, the company's first European order. Commercial customer revenue reached 47.9% of total (up over 80% from Q3 2023). Record pipeline exceeding $200 million. Established reseller program with four initial partners. CEO attributed revenue decline to order timing and uncertainty in the U.S. government's zero emission vehicle strategy, with product certification updates expected to complete in Q1 2025. Management projects a return to revenue growth in 2025 with significantly improved margins.
